hero.eyebrow: Junior Software Developer | Python | C++ | SQL

hero.descriptionTail: with Python, C++, SQL, React and functional testing, focused on junior software development opportunities.

about.title: Junior profile focused on web development, functional testing and continuous improvement.
about.description: I am a Junior Full Stack Developer with an Information Systems background. I focus on building responsive interfaces, connecting backend logic, working with databases and validating functional flows. I am targeting Junior Developer, Full Stack Junior, SDET Junior or R&D Junior opportunities where I can contribute clear code, fast learning, documentation and continuous improvement.

skills.title: Skills organized by area
skills.description: Core technologies for building interfaces, backend logic, databases, functional testing and professional workflows.

projects.title: Projects with technical evidence
projects.description: Selected cases to demonstrate responsive UI, application logic, documentation, deployment, functional testing and good practices for junior development roles.

petshop.title: Huellita PetShop
petshop.description: Responsive web application for organizing a pet product catalog with clear navigation and a consistent experience across screen sizes.
petshop.outcome: Published site with clearer structure, simple navigation and consistent mobile/desktop experience.
petshop.problem: A static catalog needed stronger visual hierarchy, product organization and simple navigation.
petshop.contribution: Responsive layout, section structure, reusable visual components and GitHub Pages publishing.

tallestBuildings.title: Tallest Buildings Catalog
tallestBuildings.description: Web application built with Nuxt.js 3 and Vue.js presenting the world’s 12 tallest skyscrapers, their cities and architectural firms through related navigation and structured data.
tallestBuildings.problem: Organize building, city and architect information into a clear, responsive and easy-to-explore experience.
tallestBuildings.contribution: Entity-based navigation, dynamic pages, Markdown and JSON content, reusable components and Netlify deployment.
tallestBuildings.outcome: Published catalog featuring 12 skyscrapers, 11 cities and 6 architecture firms with cross-navigation and responsive design.

scrabble.title: Scrabble C++
scrabble.description: Interactive console board implementation developed in C++, applying object-oriented programming, data structures and algorithmic logic.
scrabble.outcome: Improved algorithmic thinking, rule modeling and logical robustness.
scrabble.problem: Model game rules and data structures while keeping clear logic in a console application.
scrabble.contribution: Class design, board handling, move validation and object-oriented logic organization.

certifications.title: Featured credentials
certifications.description: Approved credentials supporting cloud fundamentals, GitHub and modern development tools.

contact.title: Let’s talk about junior opportunities.
contact.description: Available for Junior Software Developer opportunities in Costa Rica, remote or hybrid. Email is the main contact channel.
